de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class SolverTimeout

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.util.TimerTask
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.SolverTimeout
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Runnable

     class SolverTimeout
extends TimerTask
    The class controls the timer that checks for a solver whether it exceeds a pre-defined timeout.
